title: Embedded record separator in quoted fields
key_bug_features: Embedded record separator in quoted fields
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (c VARCHAR(3), d INT NOT NULL, e DATE DEFAULT NULL);
INSERT INTO t (c, d, e) VALUES ('def', 2, '2023-10-01');
SELECT * FROM t WHERE c LIKE '%a%';
UPDATE t SET c = 'xyz' WHERE d IS NOT NULL;
